description_long: This is a wooden bed frame featuring a classic panel design with both a headboard and a footboard. The frame is painted in a light gray or off-white color, while the tops of the headboard and footboard are accented with a natural wood finish. The bed has sturdy, rectangular legs and side rails, and the sleeping surface is supported by evenly spaced wooden slats. There is no mattress or bedding present, exposing the slatted base. The overall construction appears robust and suitable for supporting a standard mattress, with a timeless and versatile aesthetic that would fit well in both traditional and modern urban interiors.
description: A sturdy, light-colored wooden bed frame with a panel headboard and footboard, accented by natural wood tops and exposed slats.
description_view_0: Front view showing the panel footboard with a wood accent and the slatted base extending toward the headboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the slatted support system, and the height of the headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and the wood accent, with the slats partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bed's length, slatted base, and the matching design of the headboard and footboard.
